nasb.text: The rest of the acts of Joram and all that he did, are they not written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Judah?

esv.text: Now the rest of the acts of Joram, and all that he did, are they not written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Judah?

cnv.text: 約蘭其餘的事蹟和他所行的一切，不是都寫在猶大列王的年代誌上嗎？

ccb.text: 约兰其他的事及其一切所作所为都记在犹大列王史上。
